title: Hiring Software Engineer at BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Hiring Software Engineer at BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Amritsar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd:
BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd!
